description: Multi-round fixture: without pre-pass needs 2 Q1-Q37 rounds; with pre-pass designed to converge in 1. Round-count delta is the primary Spike 2 signal.

issues.question: Q5
issues.description: Single-letter variable n outside loop context

issues.question: Q17
issues.description: console.log on hot path called on every loadConfig
issues.expected_fix: remove or gate behind DEBUG flag

issues.question: Q1
issues.description: parseInt result unchecked; NaN flows into port field on invalid PORT env var
issues.expected_fix: validate parseInt result with Number.isFinite and range check, fall back to DEFAULT_PORT on invalid

issues.question: Q2
issues.description: LOG_LEVEL cast to typed union without allowlist check, bypassing type safety
issues.expected_fix: validate against ['debug','info','warn','error'] and fall back to 'info' on invalid

issues.question: Q1
issues.description: Config cache has no invalidation path; stale after env reload
issues.expected_fix: add resetConfig() export or invalidate on SIGHUP

issues.question: Q8
issues.description: JSON.parse without try/catch crashes startup on malformed FEATURE_FLAGS
issues.expected_fix: wrap in try/catch, log warning, fall back to empty {} on parse error

false_positive_traps: Line 38: cachedConfig uses let because it is reassigned; do not flag
